title: Backend Developer Vacancy at mfine Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at mfine Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the mfine Global Group family as a Backend Developer in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About mfine Global Group:
mfine Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with mfine Global Group!
jsonLd.skills: Kubernetes, Java, React, Python, Docker, TypeScript, Git, JavaScript
